requires.rationale: or ≥4 logical metadata bundles on same URN

structure.description: Detail layout where the same entity URN surfaces N facets as tabs (Schema / Documentation / Lineage / Properties / Queries / Stats / Validation / Operations / Access). Each tab is a separate aspect of the same identity; aspects compose, not inherit.

rationale.hypothesis: When detail-page content exceeds one screen and falls into orthogonal concerns owned by different roles (engineer reads Schema, steward reads Documentation, SRE reads Validation), tabs partition the page along role-of-reader rather than creation-order.

evidence.description: Service detail tabs: Overview / Resources / Traces / Profiles / Logs
Model version tabs: Overview / Artifacts / Lineage

counterexample.description: Tabs hide content needlessly when one screen suffices
